evals.prompt: Make me a TikTok video with the text '5 Reasons to Wake Up at 5AM' — show each reason one at a time with punchy animations. Dark background, gold text. The 5 reasons are: 1. Silence before the world wakes up 2. Time to exercise without excuses 3. Your brain is sharpest in the morning 4. You get a head start on everyone 5. It builds discipline that carries over
evals.expected_output: A 1080x1920 TikTok video with animated text showing 5 reasons sequentially, dark background, gold text, rendered as .mp4

assertions.name: project-scaffolds
assertions.description: npm install completes, package.json has remotion deps

assertions.name: renders-mp4
assertions.description: A valid .mp4 file exists in output

assertions.name: all-5-reasons
assertions.description: All 5 reason texts appear in source code

assertions.name: uses-animations
assertions.description: Code uses spring() or interpolate() for animations

assertions.name: sequential-reveal
assertions.description: Uses Sequence or Series to stagger reasons

assertions.name: dark-bg-gold-text
assertions.description: Dark background color and gold/yellow text color in code

assertions.name: has-hook-title
assertions.description: Title '5 Reasons to Wake Up at 5AM' appears as distinct opening scene

evals.prompt: Create an Instagram Reel with this quote: 'The best time to plant a tree was 20 years ago. The second best time is now.' Make it look clean and minimal.
evals.expected_output: A 1080x1920 Instagram Reel with animated quote text, clean/minimal design, rendered as .mp4

evals.prompt: I'm launching a new product called 'ZenBrew' — it's a matcha drink. Make me a 15-second announcement video for both TikTok and Twitter. Here's my logo: logo.png. Use green and cream colors.
evals.expected_output: Two compositions (1080x1920 TikTok + 1080x1080 Twitter), green/cream colors, logo integrated, rendered as .mp4 files
